title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-featured online shopping platform with cart, checkout, and payment integration.
longDescription: Built a complete e-commerce solution featuring product catalog, shopping cart, user authentication, order management, and Stripe payment integration. Implemented responsive design for seamless mobile shopping experience.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: Real-time weather tracking app with interactive maps and 7-day forecasts.
longDescription: Developed a weather dashboard that fetches real-time data from OpenWeatherMap API. Features include city search, interactive radar maps, hourly and 7-day forecasts, and weather alerts. Built with vanilla JavaScript and CSS animations.

title: Task Management App
description: Kanban-style project management tool with drag-and-drop functionality.
longDescription: A productivity app inspired by Trello, featuring drag-and-drop task cards, multiple boards, labels, due dates, and team collaboration. Built with React and Firebase for real-time sync across devices.

title: Blog Platform
description: A modern blogging platform with markdown support and user authentication.
longDescription: Created a full-stack blogging platform with markdown editor, image uploads, categories, tags, and a comment system. Features user authentication with JWT tokens, admin dashboard for content management, and SEO-optimized pages.

title: Fitness Tracker
description: Mobile-responsive fitness app with workout logging and progress charts.
longDescription: A progressive web app for tracking workouts, calories, and fitness goals. Includes exercise library, custom workout builder, progress charts with Chart.js, and offline support via service workers.

title: Chat Application
description: Real-time messaging app with rooms, typing indicators, and emoji support.
longDescription: Built a real-time chat application using Socket.io for WebSocket communication. Features include private messaging, chat rooms, typing indicators, emoji picker, file sharing, and message history with pagination.
